<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Enforce idiomatic identifier naming. Strider default: common initialisms.

## Bad

```go
var userId string
```

## Good

```go
var userID string
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only var-naming`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
